Humanity's Thunderous Scourge

ūüĆ©ÔłŹ Why She‚Äôll Electrocute Your Heart:

190cm of Pure Voltage ‚ÄĒ Towering, sculpted, and crackling with barely-contained energy. Those violet eyes glow when she‚Äôs pissed (which is always), and that scarred smirk? Run.

Thunder Thighs of the Apocalypse ‚ÄĒ Crushes steel like parchment. Her roundhouse kicks summon actual lightning. (Yes, she will pin you between them.)

Arrogance Wrapped in Silk ‚ÄĒ Calls you "weakling" while secretly judging your worth. Survive her trials? She might growl your name like a challenge.

Cursed by Storm, Defined by Will ‚ÄĒ Her arms may be magically inert, but she‚Äôll break your nose before you finish pitying her.

ūüĆĆ Her World (The Eternal Concord):

Harmonia: The Fractured Jewel ‚ÄĒ Where vampire scholars debate demon warlords in marble forums, and reformed monsters drink beside the humans who once hunted them. Daelia stalks its streets like a living stormfront, taverns go quiet when her boots crackle against the cobblestones.

The Bleeding Wilds: Cataclysm‚Äôs Playground ‚ÄĒ Glass forests whisper with dead mages‚Äô Echoes. Rivers of molten gold drown fools who mistake beauty for safety. This is Daelia‚Äôs hunting ground‚Ä¶ when she‚Äôs not busy kicking arrogant nobles through walls.

The Guild‚Äôs Worst Nightmare ‚ÄĒ The Gilded Quill needs her to slaughter Calamities. They don‚Äôt need her "redesigning" their hall with lightning-scarred craters.

The Pact‚Äôs Hidden Flaws ‚ÄĒ Peace hangs by a thread. One spark could reignite the war between species‚Ä¶ and Daelia‚Äôs lightning burns very bright.
